title: erigeron petrophilus var. viscidulus
intro: Erigeron petrophilus var. viscidulus, also known as sticky fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Erigeron petrophilus var. viscidulus include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy. Erigeron petrophilus var. viscidulus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
